/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/librescrs-pkcs11.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,librescrs-pkcs11.so.1 -o librescrs-pkcs11.so.1.4.0 "CMakeFiles/librescrs-pkcs11.dir/src/pkcs11.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/librescrs-pkcs11.dir/src/pkcs11_library.cpp.o"  ../eidcard/libEIdCard.a ../cardedge/libCardEdge.a ../smartcard/libSmartCard.a /usr/lib/libpcsclite.so /home/nhirsl/Dev/Code/LibreSCRS/LibreMiddleware/thirdparty/openssl-3.5.5/linux/lib/libcrypto.a -ldl -lpthread -lz
